name: briefing_locator_panel_update
description: HudUiBriefingLocatorPanel::Update recomputes the locator dirty rect, shrinks and clamps its radius, updates the base element, and invalidates the panel while hidden.
known_limits: No VC byte target currently covers 0x403cb0, so Binary-safe remains false.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly for 0x403cb0 validates the hidden-only update gate, GetX/GetY ftable dispatch through slots 0x64 and 0x68, clip rect writes using the current radius, shrink by max(int(deltaSec * 20.0), 1), clamp to radius 3 with radiusSquared 9, direct HudUiElement::Update(deltaSec), and ftable slot 0x20 invalidation.

The native smoke calls the recovered locator update ftable slot from a constructed briefing runtime and verifies visible early return, hidden clip rect recomputation, normal shrink, minimum shrink step, radius clamp, base update dirty-flag clearing, and final invalidate side effect.
